query: double exposure photograph overlapping ghostly silhouette portrait
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / double_exposure: ghostly overlapping portraits, multi-exposure

response.objective_caption: A dark, soft-edged silhouette of a person holding a camera mounted on a tripod, projected or cast against a pale, uniformly light background. The figure appears to be leaning forward with their eye near the viewfinder, one hand on the camera body, wearing a hat with a brim. Only the outer contour and a few triangular gaps of light between the figure and tripod legs are visible.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred, high-contrast black-and-white silhouette of a photographer with a tripod-mounted camera, where extreme softness dissolves all surface detail into indistinct halos of gray at every edge. The figure is cropped aggressively at the bottom of the frame, cutting off the tripod base and lower body, creating an unstable, off-balance composition. The tonal range is compressed to near-pure black and washed-out white with almost no midtones, producing an abstract, ghostlike form that sacrifices representational clarity for graphic shape and shadow.
